texto: I just needed to realize that style was like personality - it didn't always have to be consistent
autor: it just had to be something you lived with.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it just had to be something you lived with.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I just needed to realize that style was like personality - it didn't always have to be consistent” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, david-levithan, wide-awake pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de wide-awake.
